name: crypto-agent-trading
description: Agent skills for trading cryptocurrency via Crypto.com APIs. Provides two independent skills: Crypto.com App for buy/sell/swap operations and Crypto.com Exchange for spot trading with advanced order types.
author: Crypto.com

skills.name: crypto-com-app
skills.description: Buy, sell, and swap cryptocurrency via the Crypto.com App API. Supports 400+ tokens with portfolio management and trading limits.

skills.name: crypto-com-exchange
skills.description: Spot trading on Crypto.com Exchange with advanced order types (limit, market, stop-loss, OCO) and market data access.
